headline: Pinnacle West Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: PHOENIX, June 24, 2026--Pinnacle West Capital declared a quarterly dividend payable on Sept. 1, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on Aug. 3, 2026.
